final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing marketing poster for a WeChat public account article cover about the "染秋" fragrance launch.

Style/medium: premium editorial design with sophisticated typography, high-end beauty brand aesthetic, subtle texture overlays
Composition: centered layout with title as the focal point, balanced negative space around the main text block
Subject: elegant Chinese typography "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" as the hero element, refined and prominent
Scene/backdrop: soft gradient or subtle autumn-inspired abstract background, minimal and uncluttered to keep focus on text
Lighting/mood: soft diffused lighting creating gentle depth, warm and inviting atmosphere suggesting autumn warmth
Color palette: warm earthy tones (amber, rust, cream) with subtle gold accents, harmonious and premium feel
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: title must be the dominant visual element; design must remain legible at 900x500px; maintain premium brand aesthetic
Avoid: cluttered backgrounds; competing visual elements that distract from title; generic stock imagery; low contrast text; overly decorative borders
